zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland於1407年12月27日出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特時，她的父親John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset34歲，母親Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence21歲。她於1424年2月2日與James I Stewart King of Scotland在英國素瑞素瓦可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她於1439年住在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林且於1439年住在美國南達科他州傑克遜卡素。她去世於1445年7月15日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴享年37歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland于1407年12月27日出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特时，她的父亲John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset34岁，母亲Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence21岁。她于1424年2月2日与James I Stewart King of Scotland在英国素瑞素瓦可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她于1439年住在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林且于1439年住在美国南达科他州傑克遜卡素。她去世于1445年7月15日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴享年37岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Beaufort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Beaufort . The surname Beauford is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland was born on 27 December 1407, in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, her father, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, was 34 and her mother, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, was 21. She married James I Stewart King of Scotland on 2 February 1424, in Southwark, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She lived in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland in 1439 and Castle, Jackson, South Dakota, United States in 1439. She died on 15 July 1445, in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 37, and was buried in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland est née le 27 décembre 1407, à Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé James I Stewart King of Scotland le 2 février 1424, à Southwark, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle a vécu à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse en 1439 et à Castle, Jackson, Dakota du Sud, États-Unis en 1439. Elle est décédée le 15 juillet 1445, à Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland am 27. Dezember 1407 in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence 21. Sie hat am 2. Februar 1424 in Southwark, Surrey, England James I Stewart King of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1439 hat sie in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland und 1439 in Castle, Jackson, South Dakota, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 15. Juli 1445 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland è nata il il 27 dicembre 1407 nel Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, sua padre, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato James I Stewart King of Scotland il 2 febbraio 1424, nel Southwark, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland nel 1439 e nel Castle, Jackson, Dakota del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1439. Morì il 15 luglio 1445, nel Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotlandが1407年12月27日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタープアレイス オフ ウエストミンスターで生まれた時，父John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somersetは34歳，母Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarenceは21歳であった。1424年2月2日にイギリススリーソウスワークでJames I Stewart King of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年にはスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングに，1439年にはアメリカ合衆国サウスダコタ州ジャクソンカストルに住んでいた。彼女は1445年7月15日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバーで37歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: 영국 미들레세스 플레신크트 프 스트 캐더이인
ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland(이)가 1407년 12월 27일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1424년 2월 2일 영국 수리 소우스워크에서 James I Stewart King of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1439년도에 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서, 1439년도에 미국 사우스다코타 주 잭슨 카스틀에서 살았다. 그녀는 1445년 7월 15일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바 던바에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에 묻혔다.

pt.27 December 1407–15 July 1445: 27 de dezembro de 1407–15 de julho de 1445
pt.Imprisoned in Stirling Castle: Castle, Jackson, Dacota do Sul, Estados Unidos da América
pt.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Inglaterra

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland nasceu em 27 de dezembro de 1407, em Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com James I Stewart King of Scotland em 2 de fevereiro de 1424, em Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela viveu em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland em 1439 e em Castle, Jackson, Dacota do Sul, Estados Unidos da América em 1439. Ela faleceu em 15 de julho de 1445, em Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Imprisoned in Stirling Castle: кастл, джекксон, Южная Дакота, Соединенные штаты
ru.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: пресинкт оф ст катираин, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland родилась 27 декабря 1407 г. в местности палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James I Stewart King of Scotland 2 февраля 1424 г. в местности соутварк, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она жила в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия в 1439 году и в местности кастл, джекксон, Южная Дакота, Соединенные штаты в 1439 году. Она умерла 15 июля 1445 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland nació el 27 de diciembre de 1407, en Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, tenía 21 años. Se casó con James I Stewart King of Scotland el 2 de febrero de 1424, en Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland en 1439 y en Castle, Jackson, Dakota del Sur, Estados Unidos en 1439. Murió el 15 de julio de 1445, en Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
